textByHash.e08bba446c5ebf3de01d64539e0166e40b77c8b1: Greetings, I suppose you're one of those twolegs obsessed with fish?
textByHash.49c2ae80a33c2cd8962180530f169a4dc971e32c: Well, if you are, you've come to the right plaice.
textByHash.739003e1cb3cf218e293fbcd786c86e38efe70db: Is there somefin wrong with that? I mean, it's not like I have anyfin better to do.
textByHash.87c11965da248ceb993c49220337b0919e54b4c6: Reely? And there I trout you were here to sea what you could sea and experience the opportunaty of a lifetime swimming with the fishes.
textByHash.8627ff372465f1589ecba6055409ebe0a5a89098: What's wrong, do you need a herring aid?
textByHash.2c4718f35969a053ed46760f03d85fcc624ec118: Oh don't be so crabby. You should be more up to date with current affairs. Shoaly you like puns chum?
textByHash.e24845c2a140d759a44126e5c7e88181f84dfe51: Ahh, salty I sea. You provoked me into this and now you'll feel the wrasse of my tongue.
textByHash.829859c60ba1c5564b1186c0f8c41f92178ee956: Sorry, but you're really not experienced enough to use my cavern.
textByHash.61f23040f1dd706b3273619b405c50beefae33fb: I'll want 200 numulites first. If you pay me that, I'll let you in there as much as you like for the rest of this day.
textByHash.01d75df5df4e7602e882c2c97b2795869fe40196: I suppose so. Give me 20,000 numulites and I'll stop charging you for entry forever.
textByHash.cdec93e6b09daaa9694ee494ee7d0b88545787e9: Thanks - no more entry fees for you!
textByHash.e9e20c4239ffef4edfe85bd5e16919c0905274fd: You've already paid for access for the rest of today. You can come and go all day.
textByHash.490f8589f28cd99a99f8b680cd1c1a1b526cfd72: My name is Ceto. I used to be a carefree soul, but now that the twolegs are interested in these little bits of bone, I just keep my little fish farm going and the twolegs pay me a few squid.
textByHash.97b60cc891805be7ecb21e2988321810c5197b2a: Well, they said I was too young to swim with them, and I should be responsible and get a job. They're so old school.
textByHash.d67f7cb143c2101823b630594b527047622c48ff: Ahh well, I've set up a pretty good fish trap here, the terrain really lends itself to it. But you'll need a couple of drift nets.
textByHash.5cdcd9e54b8add86ab15638b01ed103db26ca083: Well I weave mine from my sisters' hair, but you'll have to make do with some plant fibres I guess. I think the twolegs have ways to do that, right?
textByHash.20b6a59a3e00508e012d829ed8c4485dcab11516: Fintastic. You may also find something spikey helps to disturb the fish and make them panic.
textByHash.27997d300f6a79813471733cc67f8154704abfe0: Yes, something with lots of spikes, maybe like a trident.
textByHash.9383e195c124419c68e3f6018bed7bcc9d2980af: I'll want 200 numulites to let you enter. If you pay me that, I'll let you in there as much as you like for the rest of this day.
textByHash.743c15c8b116a8080ed2d6a31f790b5cfc3fbe57: Those were some fintastic fossils, thank you. Don't flounder around out here, you can go in whenever you like today.
textByHash.16dae1dd472fd88ff755998b9168758cdb8e5b5e: Those were some fintastic fossils. You needn't flounder around out here - after what you paid me, I won't charge you to enter the cave again.
textByHash.a935b65704355bdf712f962c50badb3c74d05adc: You don't have enough numulites to interest me. I'll want 200.
textByHash.b0c6beee615c90638b7fae42e60d9945cab2ab5f: Who needs fronds when you have anenomes?
